destination_after_directions: Starting at "{start_label}", follow the map directions to the next labeled landmark each time: {direction_text}. What landmark do you reach?
Begin at "{start_label}" and follow these directions one step at a time: {direction_text}. Which landmark is reached?
From "{start_label}", move to the next labeled landmark for each direction: {direction_text}. What is the destination landmark?
Use the map paths from "{start_label}" and apply this direction sequence: {direction_text}. Which landmark do you end at?
Trace the route beginning at "{start_label}": {direction_text}. What labeled landmark is the final stop?
landmark_after_route_step: On the highlighted orange route from "{route_start_label}" to "{route_end_label}", what is the {step_ordinal} landmark reached after "{route_start_label}"?
Follow the highlighted route from "{route_start_label}" toward "{route_end_label}". Which landmark is reached {step_ordinal} after the start?
Using only the orange route, count landmarks after "{route_start_label}". What is the {step_ordinal} reached landmark?
Trace the highlighted path from "{route_start_label}" to "{route_end_label}". Which label is at the {step_ordinal} reached landmark?
Starting at "{route_start_label}", follow the orange route in order. What landmark is reached {step_ordinal}?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:destination_after_directions.object_description: a printed campus layout with labeled landmarks, named zones, visible walking paths, and a compass
query:destination_after_directions.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible destination landmark label
query:destination_after_directions.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an ordered array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes around the route landmarks from the start through the destination

query:landmark_after_route_step.object_description: a printed campus layout with labeled landmarks, named zones, visible walking paths, and a highlighted orange route
query:landmark_after_route_step.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible landmark label at the requested route step
query:landmark_after_route_step.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an ordered array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes around the highlighted-route landmarks from the start through the requested landmark
